## Local test data privacy

- [ ] Validation is summarized with outcomes and aggregate counters only.
- [ ] No local file names, directory names, source names, usernames, hostnames, mount paths, device identifiers, or volume/share names are included.
- [ ] No raw local scan, hash, import, mount, benchmark, database, stdout, or stderr log is attached.
- [ ] Any included fixture names are synthetic values already committed to the repository.
- [ ] The title and body passed `tools/check_github_text_privacy.py`, or the PR was created through `tools/create_safe_pr.py`.

See `docs/LOCAL_TEST_DATA_PRIVACY.md`.
